Help & Feedback

This is a static file, so there's no live AI running inside it. Search the FAQ below (simple keyword match, not AI), or describe your issue and copy it over to the Claude conversation where this dashboard was built ? I'll make the fix and send back an updated file.
Built with ♫ in Miami

Venue ROI Rules

Each venue has its own BS Target and ROI Target by DJ fee tier, day of week, and season. When a DJ's fee falls between two tiers, the dashboard uses the nearest one. If the fee doesn't exactly match a tier's anchor fee, the BS Target stays fixed and the ROI Target is recalculated so the dollar target owed stays the same. Edit anything below ? changes apply immediately and are saved in this browser.

Import from Excel

Upload an updated "Act vs. Forecast Reporting" style export (same layout as your minimum reporting files, or a Toast sales export with Date + BS Actual columns). This runs entirely in your browser ? the file never leaves your computer. It refreshes BS Actual for matching dates; ROI and BS Target keep coming from your Venue ROI Rules.
